title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest AI tools and resume features. 🌿
points: 🔔 New In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Instantly check for new updates anytime with the new icon in your App Bar.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, distraction-free experience.
